creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 226565
Better after preferring Ubuntu Mono 10 pt for the toolbar

With a preference for Ubuntu Mono 10: Firefox appeared better, and remained so after I unlocked fontconfig and allowed an upgrade to 2.13.93_1,1. 

Still, things are not as they should be; the title bars of windows do not use my preferred font.
